headline: Galapagos NV (GLPG) Signs Agreement with Gilead on Ouro Medicines Assets
summary: Galapagos NV (NASDAQ:GLPG) is one of the 7 Fastest Growing European Stocks to Invest In. On March 31, 2026, Galapagos NV (NASDAQ:GLPG) announced a binding agreement with Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) related to Gilead’s planned acquisition of Ouro Medicines, a U.S.-based biotech focused on T cell engager therapies for autoimmune diseases. The deal includes access to […]
